name: Credentials In Files - Suspicious Credential File Search
description: Detects credential searching in files using findstr, grep, Select-String, or Snaffler. Monitors for password/secret/key search patterns in configuration files, scripts, and logs.
query: process where event.type == "start" and ((process.name == "findstr.exe" and process.args : ("*password*", "*secret*", "*credential*", "*api_key*", "*connectionstring*")) or process.name : ("Snaffler.exe", "snaffler.exe") or process.args : ("*trufflehog*", "*gitleaks*") or (process.name : ("powershell.exe", "pwsh.exe") and process.args : "*Select-String*" and process.args : ("*password*", "*secret*", "*key*")))
